name: AI Voice Agent — Outbound Campaign Workflow

nodes.name: Campaign Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs hourly to check for pending outbound calls. Can also be triggered manually or via webhook.

nodes.name: Fetch Pending Outbound Calls
nodes.notes: Fetches pending outbound calls from the queue sheet. Columns: phone, name, purpose, language_pref, scheduled_time, business_id, template, status.

nodes.name: Filter Calls Ready to Execute
nodes.notes: Filters to only calls scheduled for now or past, and only during business hours (10 AM - 8 PM IST).

nodes.name: Initiate Outbound Call via Twilio
nodes.notes: Initiates outbound call via Twilio. Includes answering machine detection. Webhook URL passes caller context.

nodes.name: Outbound Greeting Webhook
nodes.notes: Twilio hits this when the outbound call connects. Generates a purpose-specific greeting.

nodes.name: Generate Outbound Greeting
nodes.notes: Generates context-specific greeting for outbound calls. Handles voicemail detection — leaves a short message instead of running the full agent.

nodes.name: Call Status Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives call status updates from Twilio (completed, failed, busy, no-answer). Updates the queue sheet.

nodes.name: Update Queue Status
nodes.notes: Updates the outbound queue with call result: completed, failed, busy, voicemail, no-answer, etc.
